chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-60 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 7866/17 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 7867/17 4. For hearing. 30.10.2017 Tariq Ali Mirjat, Advocate for applicants alongwith applicants. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. Learned Counsel for applicants submits that applicants want to surrender before the concerned Court to seek pre-arrest bail in accordance with law but they apprehend their imminent arrest at the hands of police at the instance of complainant party. Learned Counsel submits that protective bail may be granted to the applicants in order to enable them to surrender before the concerned Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicants are granted protective bail for a period of 05 days from today subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. The operation of N.B.Ws, if any, issued against the applicants shall remain suspended for the period of 05 days. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 05 days on 03.11.2017 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
